title: H-A2 lower-resolution proxy test
hypothesis: The H-A2 macro-conditioned ORB mechanism is real only if scheduled macro-event and volatility-regime labels explain a stable difference in opening-range follow-through and already-observed implementable option outcomes. If lower-resolution opening proxies and existing trade outcomes do not show this relationship, H-A2 should be weakened or deprioritized before chasing exact 2022 SPY 1-minute bars.
research_question: Can already-available local data, at 5-minute or 15-minute proxy resolution, weaken, falsify at proxy level, or prioritize H-A2 before any new exact 2022 underlying-bar source is pursued?

mechanism_proxy.reason: The proxy question is whether opening follow-through and existing trade outcomes vary coherently by macro/VIX regime. A 5-minute bar can represent the 9:30-9:35 ET opening range, and a 15-minute bar can test a coarser opening-momentum proxy. Neither can prove exact 2022 ORB fills.

required_resolutions: SPY 1-minute bars for the exact tested date range
SPY 0DTE option bid/ask quotes at entry, exit checks, and forced close
exact_backtest.reason: Exact ORB entry timing, breakout ordering, stop/target path, and option fill timing require timestamp-aligned intraday bars and option quotes.

planned_proxy_tests.decision_timestamp_policy: Use only labels known before entry for prior-close VIX/VXV and scheduled macro events; same-day post-entry market data cannot define the entry filter.
planned_proxy_tests.measurement: Compare opening-range follow-through, realized intraday range, and directional persistence by macro-event and VIX regime.
planned_proxy_tests.allowed_claim: H-A2 mechanism is supported, weakened, or prioritized at E1 proxy level.

planned_proxy_tests.decision_timestamp_policy: Use only pre-entry observable labels and the first 15-minute bar as a coarse opening proxy.
planned_proxy_tests.measurement: Check whether coarser opening momentum preserves the same macro/VIX relationship as the 5-minute proxy.
planned_proxy_tests.allowed_claim: Data-resolution sensitivity supports or weakens the need for exact ORB work.

planned_proxy_tests.decision_timestamp_policy: Reuse only existing 2023-2024 trade artifacts; do not tune filters on OOS after viewing results.
planned_proxy_tests.measurement: Reconcile proxy labels with existing implementable PnL, trade count, cost drag, and drawdown by macro/VIX regime.
planned_proxy_tests.allowed_claim: Existing exact-quote outcomes are coherent or incoherent with the lower-resolution mechanism proxy.

allowed_claims: H-A2 is weakened at proxy level.
H-A2 is falsified at proxy level and should not justify exact 2022 bar-source work without a revised mechanism.
H-A2 remains worth exact-data prioritization because proxy and existing outcome evidence are directionally coherent.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim exact 2022-10 ORB entries/exits were tested.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade edge.
Do not claim deployable strategy edge.
Do not approve paper trading or operational validation.
Do not treat 15-minute proxy evidence as exact 5-minute ORB evidence.
Do not request IBKR bars or buy new data from this preregistration alone.
completion_criteria_for_future_run: All pre-registered proxy tests are either run or explicitly marked unavailable with source evidence.
Trial count and search log are reported.
MinTRL/PSR/DSR, under-sampled, underpowered, and big-day dependency policies are applied where applicable.
Conclusion is one of the project labels: ผ่าน, ไม่ผ่าน, ยังสรุปไม่ได้.
Next action states whether H-A2 should be falsified, parked, revised, or prioritized for exact-data work.
